creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On CURRENT (FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #6 r295146: Tue Feb  2 12:53:16 CET 2016 amd64), port lang/gcc fails to build due to the error shown below.

[...]
checking whether ln -s works... yes
checking for x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.0-gcc... /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc/work/build/./gcc/xgcc -B/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc/work/build/./gcc/ -B/usr/local/x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.0/bin/ -B/usr/local/x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.0/lib/ -isystem /usr/local/x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.0/include -isystem /usr/local/x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.0/sys-include   
checking for suffix of object files... configure: error: in `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc/work/build/x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.0/libgcc':
configure: error: cannot compute suffix of object files: cannot compile
See `config.log' for more details.
Makefile:10661: recipe for target 'configure-target-libgcc' failed
gmake[2]: *** [configure-target-libgcc] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc/work/build'
Makefile:856: recipe for target 'all' failed
gmake[1]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gcc/work/build'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1
